rules.name: Scanner API - scan current workspace (basic)
rules.description: Initiates a metadata scan for the current workspace (resolved from context) with no optional flags. Returns the raw workspace info scan result.

rules.name: Scanner API - scan current workspace (basic)
rules.description: Initiates a metadata scan for the current workspace (resolved from context) with no optional flags. Returns the raw workspace info scan result.

rules.name: Scanner API - scan current workspace (basic)
rules.description: Initiates a metadata scan for the current workspace (resolved from context) with no optional flags. Returns the raw workspace info scan result.

rules.name: Scanner API - scan workspace with datasource details
rules.description: Scans a specific workspace and requests datasource details and lineage information. POST https://api.powerbi.com/v1.0/myorg/admin/workspaces/getInfo?lineage={lineage}&datasourceDetails={datasourceDetails}&datasetSchema={datasetSchema}&datasetExpressions={datasetExpressions}&getArtifactUsers={getArtifactUsers}

rules.name: Scanner API - scan workspace, checks lakehouses
Scanner API - scan workspace with all metadata
rules.description: Scans a specific workspace requesting all available metadata: lineage, datasource details, dataset schema, dataset expressions, and artifact users.

rules.name: Scanner API - scan multiple workspaces
rules.description: Scans two workspaces in a single call with datasource details enabled. Up to 100 workspace IDs can be supplied.

rules.name: Scanner API - assert workspace has at least one report
rules.description: Scans the current workspace and verifies that at least one report exists in the scan result.
